label: RECONSTRUCTION — NOT the original Attempt 2 raw bytes
capture_note: The original Attempt 2 raw model bytes were NOT persisted by the prior session; only a prose description existed. This fixture is a RECONSTRUCTION: a fresh, real capture produced by sending the exact production LlmPatchProvider prompt (patch_provider.rs:1811) plus the Task 1 goal to qwen2.5-coder:7b at temperature 0.0. It is reproducible and demonstrates the same production outcome (zero usable edits) via a DIFFERENT but related path: the model emitted the ```edit``` (FILE/SEARCH/REPLACE) format the prompt requests, yet production parse_edits_from_response rejects it because the markdown/edit-block fallback is #[cfg(test)]-gated and disabled in production builds. This also exposes a prompt/parser mismatch: the production prompt asks for ```edit``` blocks while the production parser only accepts strict JSON.

reproduction.prompt_template:
You are a coding assistant. Generate edits to complete this task.

Task: {task}
Requirements: {requirements}

Generate edits using the format:
```edit
FILE: path/to/file.rs
SEARCH:
<content to find>
REPLACE:
<new content>
```
